prompt: Create a polished vertical anime illustration of a young woman standing outdoors on a sunny hillside overlook, with her face deliberately obscured by a centered opaque square censor block in muted dusty brown-pink. She has warm medium brown shoulder-length wavy bob hair with a braided section along the left side, loose flyaway strands, and sunlight highlights. She wears a frilly summer outfit: exactly 2 main clothing pieces, a white cropped ruffled camisole with lace trim, buttons, thin straps, and a small pale pink bow at the neckline, plus a high-waisted pale pink flared skirt with large white ruffled hem panels. Pose her in a graceful three-quarter view, one arm raised with the hand behind her head and the other arm lowered near the skirt, emphasizing soft fabric folds and a breezy romantic mood. Set the background as a bright pastoral village landscape with green fields, scattered houses, trees, distant blue mountains, and a pale blue sky with tiny glowing particles, using shallow depth of field and soft atmospheric perspective. Style should be high-detail Japanese anime key visual, clean line art, pastel colors, glossy highlights, delicate skin shading, warm summer lighting, and a vertical 2:3 composition. Keep the censor square flat, untextured, and perfectly rectangular, covering the entire facial area without revealing facial features; no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
